ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2025 Continued To Jul-29-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment (Motions)
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept: 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes;Bailiff: Deputy Jones; Not Reported.(D505)

This matter came on calendar this day for a request for default judgment against Defendant Amour Vert Inc.

Appearances:
Victoria Knowles, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference representing Plaintiff Cheryl Thurston who was not present.

The Court has reviewed at length the facts of the case and finds in favor of the Plaintiff.

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:
Damages $12,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Costs $607.07
Attorney's Fees $370.00
Other $0
Total Judgment $12,977.07

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.
